annotation_target.structure: Late section consequent — maximum expressive depth
teaching_goals: the late section resolution carries more weight than the opening's
feel the difference between the first and late resolutions
style_tips: the late Ab arrival is deeper — more resonant
hold slightly longer after the resolution

teaching_notes.note: The late-section resolution — deeper and more resonant than the opening's.
technique: weight and depth on the Ab

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 61–64 of Pathetique Sonata, 2nd Movement (Adagio cantabile) (continuation of mm. 57–60), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 61–64 and describe the continuation.
